title: Post-026 Workstation Migration Readiness Reassessment
objective: If Packet 026 closes cleanly, reassess the workstation-migration lane after the validated Packet 023 one-file application-surface trial has been published and `/home/olares/code/apex` has returned to clean parity, without treating that result as migration approval or reopening runtime, service, hosting, or old-clone mutation scope.
dependency_note: This packet is preparatory only until Packet 026 execution proves the validated Packet 023 one-file test artifact was published through the parent-root boundary and `/home/olares/code/apex` returned to clean parity. It should not execute against a partial or failed Packet 026 result.
required_inputs: Packet 026 execution handoff showing whether the validated Packet 023 test artifact was published and the host mirror returned to clean parity
Current workstation parent-root status at `C:/APEX Platform` after Packet 026
Current `/home/olares/code/apex` branch, commit, cleanliness, and presence of the Packet 023, Packet 024, Packet 025, and Packet 026 authority artifacts
constrained_outputs: A dated reassessment handoff classifying the workstation-migration lane as still bounded-trial-ready, advanced to application-source-trial-ready, or still blocked
No migration approval unless the evidence truly justifies it, which this packet should assume it does not by default

No runtime mutation, service change, install work, package change, production-source edit, remote rewrite, force/reset/clean, AI-services rollout, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, or old-clone mutation
validation_steps: Verify Packet 026 completed successfully and published the bounded Packet 023/024/025 authority set.
Verify `/home/olares/code/apex` is on `clean-main`, clean, and synchronized to the Packet 026 governing commit.
Verify the host mirror now contains the published Packet 023 test artifact plus the Packet 024 and Packet 025 authority artifacts needed to interpret it.
Reassess whether the lane remains only bounded-trial-ready, advances to a narrower application-source-trial-ready posture, or still has blockers.
Name exactly one next packet after the reassessment.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes only a bounded reassessment of the workstation-migration lane after Packet 026. It does not authorize database writes, runtime mutation, service changes, install work, package changes, production-source changes, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting changes, migration approval by default, remote rewrite, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
closure_note: Not yet executed. Packet 027 is prepared in advance so the lane has a bounded reassessment surface ready if Packet 026 closes successfully.
next_action: Execute only after Packet 026 completes cleanly. Do not use Packet 027 to publish artifacts, mutate runtime, change services, install dependencies, edit production source, rewrite remotes, force, reset, clean, or mutate the old clone.
